table_introductions.table_introduction: This table provides a consolidated view of field sales orders and performance metrics across employees, clients, products, distributors, and geographies. It includes order dates, employee hierarchy, outlet details, product and SKU attributes, sales quantities and values, coverage/productivity measures, month-to-date KPIs, targets, and achievement percentages. Analysts can use it to track sales performance, outlet coverage, new outlet contribution, product/category trends, and employee or territory-level target achievement.

This table provides a consolidated view of parlor segment sales activity for the NE division, combining order-level transactions with employee hierarchy, outlet details, product attributes, distributor/beat information, and performance metrics. It includes quantities, gross and net sales values, productive calls, ECO, month-to-date measures, targets, achievement percentages, and new outlet indicators. Analysts can use it to track field sales performance, outlet productivity, product/category sales, territory trends, target achievement, and new outlet contribution.

This table is a retail sales and field-force performance master view for the NE division, combining order-level transactions with employee hierarchy, outlet, distributor, beat, and product details. It includes sales metrics such as quantity, gross value, net sales value, productive calls, coverage indicators, month-to-date measures, targets, and achievement percentages. It can be used to analyze retail productivity, outlet coverage, product/category performance, new outlet contribution, and employee or territory-level target achievement.
